sessions.title: Analyse this image: Screenshot 2026-06-25 at 1.35.41 PM.png

history.content: Analyse this image: Screenshot 2026-06-25 at 1.35.41 PM.png

The image shows a screenshot of a computer screen with a web browser open to the GitHub website. The browser is Safari, and the user appears to be navigating through their GitHub dashboard. The dashboard includes a list of top repositories, a search bar, and sections for trending repositories. The repositories listed include projects and skills such as "AutoCode," "call-crm-project," and "reverse-skill." The interface also shows options for creating issues, writing code, and managing pull requests. The user has several tabs open, including one labeled "Building Local ML," suggesting they might be working on machine learning projects.
Hello! How can I assist you today?
